<!-- voorblad1 -->
<!-- voorblad2 -->

\newpage

# Balans per December 2023

```{python}
#| echo: false
import sys
import pandas as pd
from openpyxl import load_workbook
from openpyxl.utils.exceptions import InvalidFileException
from great_tables import GT
from pathlib import Path
from my_excel_lib import table_exists, get_table_coordinates, read_table_from_excel 

from great_tables.data import sp500


# Define constants
file_path = Path("_data") / "ar23.xlsx"
fy = "2023"

```

temp

```{python}
#| echo: false

# Define the start and end dates for the data range
start_date = "2010-06-07"
end_date = "2010-06-14"

# Filter sp500 using Pandas to dates between `start_date` and `end_date`
sp500_mini = sp500[(sp500["date"] >= start_date) & (sp500["date"] <= end_date)]

# Create a display table based on the `sp500_mini` table data
(
    GT(sp500_mini)
    .tab_header(title="S&P 500", subtitle=f"{start_date} to {end_date}")
    .fmt_currency(columns=["open", "high", "low", "close"])
    .fmt_date(columns="date", date_style="wd_m_day_year")
    .fmt_number(columns="volume", compact=True)
    .cols_hide(columns="adj_close")
)
```

Balans - Activa

```{python}
#| echo: false

wb = openpyxl.load_workbook(file_path, data_only=True)
ws = wb.[fy]  # specify sheet: wb["Sheet1"]
table_range = ws.tables["Activa"].ref  # e.g., 'A1:D10'

if table_exists:

# Read the table range into pandas
df = pd.read_excel(file_path, sheet_name=ws.title, usecols=table_range, engine="openpyxl")

wb = openpyxl.load_workbook(file_path, data_only=True)
ws = wb.[fy]  # specify sheet: wb["Sheet1"]
table_range = ws.tables["Activa"].ref  # e.g., 'A1:D10'

#
df = load_table(file_path,table_name)

df = df.rename(columns={"Note": ""}) # Replace header "Note" with empty string

#gt_table = (
#    GT(df)
#    .fmt_number(columns=["2022", "2023"], decimals=0, use_seps=True)
#    .cols_align(columns=["2022", "2023"], align="right")
#    .cols_align(columns=[""], align="center")
#)

gt_table

```

Balans - Passiva

```{python}
#| echo: false

wb = openpyxl.load_workbook(file_path, data_only=True)
ws = wb.[fy]  # specify sheet: wb["Sheet1"]
table_range = ws.tables["Passiva"].ref  # e.g., 'A1:D10'

df = pd.read_excel(file_path, sheet_name=fy, usecols="A:E", nrows=13)
df = df.rename(columns={"Note": ""}) # Replace header "Note" with empty string

#gt_table = (
#    GT(df)
#    .fmt_number(columns=["2022", "2023"], decimals=0, use_seps=True)
#    .cols_align(columns=["2022", "2023"], align="right")
#    .cols_align(columns=[""], align="center")
#)

gt_table

```

\newpage

# Winst-en-verliesrekening over 2023

|                                 |        |   2023  |         |  2022  |        |
|---------------------------------|:------:|--------:|--------:|-------:|-------:|
| **Netto-omzet**                 |**(9)** |         | 1.100   |        |      0 |
| **Kosten**                      |        |         |         |        |        |
| Personeelskosten                |  (10)  | 14.922  |         | 32.650 |        | 
| Afschrijvingen                  |  (11)  |      0  |         |    871 |        |
| Overige bedrijfskosten          |  (12)  |155.886  |         | 11.470 |        |
|                                 |        |---------|         |--------|        |
|                                 |        |         |170.807  |        | 44.991 |
| **Bedrijfsresultaat**           |        |         |(169.707)|        |(44.991)|
| Financiele baten en lasten      |  (13)  |      0  |         |        |        |
| **Resultaat voor belastingen**  |        |      0  |         |        |        |
| Belastingen                     |  (14)  |      0  |         |        |        |
| Resultaat deelnemingen          |  (15)  |      0  |         |        |        |
| **Resultaat na belastingen**    |        |     0  |         |        |        |  



```{python}
#| echo: false

file_path = Path("_data") / "ar23.xlsx"
df = pd.read_excel("_data/ar23.xlsx", sheet_name="2023", usecols="A:E", nrows=13)
df = df.rename(columns={"Note": ""}) # Replace header "Note" with empty string

gt_table = (
    GT(df)
    .fmt_number(columns=["2022", "2023"], decimals=0, use_seps=True)
    .cols_align(columns=["2022", "2023"], align="right")
    .cols_align(columns=[""], align="center")
)

gt_table

```
